description: Create a solid twisted turbine blade in FreeCAD by lofting between a root profile and a tip profile. The root profile is an ellipse centered at (0,0,0) with a 20mm major radius and 6mm minor radius. The tip profile is an ellipse centered at (0,0,100) with a 12mm major radius and 3mm minor radius, rotated 45 degrees counter-clockwise around the Z-axis. Save the model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/turbine_blade.FCStd.
